[Image #1] we need to use line separators on the catalog we provide (if they are already there we need to render new lines on the tail tui)
Fixed the tail TUI to properly render embedded newlines in catalog and multi-line content by splitting on escape sequences in JSON payloads and respecting actual newlines in sidecar messages.
Created two commits: one fixing TUI newline rendering and another removing deprecated config, adding progress bars, and enabling think mode.
